comments.author: @Aventurex-686
comments.text: Pure art. This is hands down the best documentary on Lebanon I’ve ever watched. Everything from the historical depth to the showcase of Lebanese cuisine was handled with such care and accuracy. The cinematography is mind-blowing, and the editing ties it all together perfectly. Do yourself a favor and watch this alone with no distractions—you need to truly absorb the beauty of this 'Switzerland of the East.' Truly exceptional work, True Horizons. Thank you for this masterpiece!

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text:
Wow, thank you so much for this incredibly thoughtful comment. ❤️ It really means a lot to us to know that the documentary made such a strong impression on you.

We are grateful that you took the time to watch and share your experience. Thank you for supporting TRUE HORIZONS! 🙏
